items.name_en: Black Size: 20 x 16 x 7.5 CM
items.name_cn:
Black Size: 20 x 16 x 7.5 CM
A top-tier original factory item that luxury lovers keep repurchasing! The leather, hardware, and craftsmanship are full of authentication points! Not only is it fully original leather, but the hardware, stitching, hot stamping, and webbing are also made of the same materials and craftsmanship as the counter! High-definition, unfiltered real photos; what you see is exactly the texture you get! This Cluny mini handbag features a smooth resin LV logo for high recognition, and imported wavy calfskin is highly durable! A simple design paired with a high-density wide webbing strap, it is both formal and business-like yet retains a youthful vibe, a perfect bag that is elegant and casual!

items.name_cn:
Size 11*8*4cm
This hard-to-get hot item PHONE BOX phone bag (M44914) was taken off the website as soon as it was released. To buy it, you must book it at the counter first. Our overseas channel stock is in. This L*V PHONE BOX bag has a delicate, retro, exquisite appearance, presenting the phone bag in a new BOX look, giving a full sense of freshness, a youthful look, and can be carried on the shoulder, making it completely fine to use as a general small bag for going out! It is enough to hold a large-screen phone body, so it became a hot model as soon as it was released! The upright design makes the compact body hold more than a general small bag!

Inspired by the 1960s Knick-Knack handbag, this Lockit BB handbag offers flexible carrying options. The Monogram coated canvas features a curved top edge and oval trim, echoing classic elements of the original design. The padlock closure pays homage to the brand's long heritage.
Size: 15 x 19 x 7 cm

items.name_en: Exclusive photo M11623 This Pochette Accessoire XL handbag is presented in Monogram Dust canvas, featuring a Monogram pattern weathered by time, injecting a bold spirit into the classic silhouette from 1990. The spacious main zip compartment features a patch pocket, along with a non-functional tassel nameplate and removable Marque L.Vuitton Déposée decoration. Monogram Dust coated canvas - aged calfskin trim - fabric lining - metal hardware - main zip compartment - interior patch pocket - non-functional removable tassel nameplate - removable round decoration - shoulder strap: removable, adjustable - dimensions: 28x16.5x9CM
